data.name: FUTAHAMMER
data.detailed_description:
In the grim darkness of the 69th Millennium, the galaxy's fiercest warriors bring their own heavy artillery.

FUTAHAMMER is a relentless, heavy-metal arcade breaker set in a universe where the women of the Holy Vanguard are packing serious extra firepower. We’ve taken classic brick-breaking action and combined it with a grim-sexy parody of your favorite dark sci-fi universe—now featuring the absolute best of both worlds.

The heretics have erected blockades across the sector, and it’s up to your tactical mastery to break them down. Command your Holy Orb and wield your Power Paddle to smash through enemy defenses. Every sector you conquer rewards you with highly classified, fully animated encounters with futanari commanders, alien matriarchs, and cybernetic zealots who are heavily armed in more ways than one.

⚔️ Tactical Advantages:

  • Superior Firepower: Experience explicit, high-quality, uncensored scenes featuring Futa x Girl and Futa x Futa action. These warriors don't need a man to lead the charge.

  • Purge the Unclean: Classic, addictive arcade physics. Bounce the Orb, break the barriers, and crush the heretical blocks.

  • Heavy Support: Upgrade your paddle with blessed power-ups. Deploy multi-balls, plasma lasers, and explosive rounds to maximize your penetration.

  • The Golden Archives: A gallery mode fit for a Lord Commander. Replay your unlocked conquests and admire the massive "payloads" at your leisure.

  • No Retreat: Pure, straightforward arcade action. No complex skill trees or dialogue—just raw physics and immediate gratification.

The enemy's defenses are thick, but your resolve is thicker. Suit up, Commander.

data.short_description: In the grim darkness of the far future, the girls pack their own heavy artillery. A sci-fi parody arcade breaker where you smash heretical blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored futanari scenes. No diplomacy, no dialogue—just heavy metal physics and massive payloads.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
